name: rg
description: Recursively search the current directory for a regex pattern

name: -S
--smart-case
options.description: Be case-insensitive unless the pattern has uppercase

name: -v
--invert-match
options.description: Show lines that do not match

name: -l
--files-with-matches
options.description: Print only the paths that contain a match

name: -c
--count
options.description: Print the number of matching lines per file

name: -A
--after-context
options.description: Show NUM lines after each match

name: -B
--before-context
options.description: Show NUM lines before each match

name: -C
--context
options.description: Show NUM lines before and after each match

name: -t
--type
options.description: Restrict the search to a file type

name: -g
--glob
options.description: Include or exclude files matching a glob

name: -F
--fixed-strings
options.description: Treat the pattern as a literal string
